testcase.name: refreshFailure_retainsLastGoodCache
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.903 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.904 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=1 active=1 topics=[Microsoft.cardShip.v1.0] 09:46:16.905 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.906 [main] ERROR com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Failed to refresh subscription cache – retaining last known good snapshot. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/Users/sobhan/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.5/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.5.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: inactiveSubscriberStatus_ignoredInCache
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.912 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.912 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=1 active=0 topics=[]

testcase.name: successfulRefresh_replacesOldCache
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.914 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.914 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=1 active=1 topics=[Microsoft.cardShip.v1.0] 09:46:16.914 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.914 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=1 active=1 topics=[Uscb.cardTracker.v1.0]

testcase.name: loadOnStartup_filtersToActiveOnly
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.916 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.916 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=3 active=2 topics=[Microsoft.cardShip.v1.0, Uscb.Microsoft.cardTracker.v1.0]

testcase.name: activeTopicNames_returnsDistinctTopics
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.917 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.918 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=3 active=3 topics=[TopicB, TopicA]

testcase.name: inactiveTopicStatus_ignoredInCache
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.923 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.923 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=1 active=0 topics=[]

testcase.name: findByTopic_returnsMatchingSubscriptions
testcase.system-out: 09:46:16.924 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Refreshing subscription cache from DynamoDB 09:46:16.925 [main] INFO com.company.deliverylistener.application.service.SubscriptionCacheService -- Subscription cache refreshed: total=3 active=3 topics=[Uscb.cardTracker.v1.0, Microsoft.cardShip.v1.0]
